projects.title: Nebula Commerce
projects.description: A conversion-focused commerce experience with cinematic product storytelling, cart flows, and performance-first storefront architecture.
projects.challenge: The biggest challenge was balancing luxurious motion with fast product browsing, especially across high-density catalog surfaces.
projects.improvements: Next iteration would add personalized merchandising, A/B tested product narrative blocks, and deeper inventory intelligence.

projects.title: Horizon Studio
projects.description: A premium creative agency platform with animated case studies, immersive transitions, and flexible CMS-driven content zones.
projects.challenge: The project demanded high-impact storytelling without sacrificing accessibility or maintainability for the editorial team.
projects.improvements: A stronger design ops pipeline and more granular motion preferences would make future content publishing smoother.

projects.title: Atlas Board
projects.description: A design-system-driven dashboard for product operations with tight information hierarchy, modular UI patterns, and polished data views.
projects.challenge: The hard part was creating enterprise-grade density while still making the interface feel elegant and visually breathable.
projects.improvements: Future work would expand the component token system and formalize advanced accessibility testing in CI.
